column1: # YMC — Example Hosts CSV
# This file shows real-world usage patterns. Copy hosts_template.csv for your
# own use — this file is for reference only.
# DNS domain suffix for all bare hostnames in this file.
# Bare hostname "web01" becomes "web01.corp.local" at scan time.
# FQDNs and IPs are never modified.
domain
host
# --- Primary Data Center ---
# Bare hostname — domain suffix corp.local will be appended automatically
web01
# Explicit FQDN — domain suffix is NOT appended (already has a dot)
db01.corp.local
# Domain controller — uses a different service account with DC-specific rights
dc01
# --- DR Site ---
# IP address used because DR site has no internal DNS resolution
# Domain suffix is NOT appended to IPs

column5: HTTPS WinRM (5986) - self-signed cert in DR

column1: # Explicit FQDN to a different domain — stays exactly as written
jump01.dr.corp.local
